main.description: List notifications for the authenticated viewer. Requires a valid session cookie; responds 401 otherwise. Notifications are derived from indexed records (no separate notification table) and grouped by subject: one entry per subject bud of the viewer's that has new activity. When `seenAt` is supplied, only activity strictly after that timestamp is considered.

seenAt.description: Only consider activity strictly after this timestamp. Omit on first call to load the most recent notifications without filtering.

kind.description: Discriminator for the notification type. Only 'continuation' is emitted today (someone wrote a child bud on one of the viewer's buds); more kinds may be added without a breaking change.

subjectUri.description: AT-URI of the viewer's bud the notification is about. For 'continuation', this is the parent bud that was extended.

subjectTitle.description: Title of the subject bud at time of query, for rendering convenience.

latestAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent qualifying event in this group. Drives sort order.

actors.description: Up to 10 unique actors who produced qualifying events, most-recent actor first. A single actor contributing multiple events appears once.

actorCount.description: Total number of unique actors contributing qualifying events, which may exceed actors.length when more than 10 actors are involved.
